title: Infosys Internal Reorganization of Argentina Subsidiary Shareholding
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed an internal reorganization involving transfer of 90% of Infosys Limited's shareholding in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary. The consideration is ~ USD 0.5 Mn, with expected completion on January 29, 2026. The Argentina subsidiary contributed USD3.6 Mn revenue and USD -2.0 Mn net-worth as on March 31, 2025.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited, approved transfer of 90% of the shareholding held by Infosys Limited in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina.
The expected date of completion of sale/disposal is January 29, 2026.
Consideration received from such sale/disposal is ~ USD 0.5 Mn.

corporate_actions.description: Transfer of 90% of the shareholding held by Infosys Limited in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina, a majority owned subsidiary, to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

important_text_spans.text: Revenue: USD3.6 Mn(0.02% of consolidated revenue of USD 19,277 Mn) Net-worth: USD -2.0 Mn (-0.02% of consolidated net-worth of USD 11,255 Mn)
important_text_spans.reason: Shows the small financial scale of the Argentina subsidiary relative to Infosys consolidated figures.

important_text_spans.text: Consideration received from such sale/disposal; ~ USD 0.5 Mn

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the disclosure concerns an intra-group reorganization of a small subsidiary, with revenue and net-worth each representing 0.02% or less of consolidated figures.
